title: PE and sport premium: conditions of grant 2025 to 2026
body: "Conditions of grant   Schools and local authorities must follow the terms and conditions set out in the PE and sport premium conditions of grant.  Any use of the PE and sport premium must be in accordance with the terms outlined in this document.   Allocations   We will have now published the 2025 to 2026 allocations for PE and sport premium.  Further information   We have also published guidance on how to use the PE and sport premium.  "

taxons.title: Pupil premium and other school premiums
